title: Provide consultation in a legal framework
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide consultation in a legal framework demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Analyse the legal context

pcs.text: Determine legislation and legal cases for area of arboricultural specialisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine legislation and legal cases for area of arboricultural specialisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine legislation and legal cases for area of arboricultural specialisation.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and analyse state, territory and federal legislation, regulations and planning instruments pertaining to arboriculture.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply legal and ethical standards to professional practice.
